demo.title: consign-token.sh
demo.code:
# 1. Authorize a consignment deal
curl -X POST https://my.coinhero.fun/api/agent/deals/authorize \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer rips_agent_live_...' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"tokenAddress":"0x...","managerAddress":"0x...","tokenName":"My Token","tokenSymbol":"MTK","tokenDecimals":18,"dailyPurchaseUsd":10}'

# 2. Sign and broadcast the returned transaction.data from your managerAddress
# (use viem, ethers, or your agent's wallet SDK)

# 3. Deposit tokens (compute amount from currentPrice + tokenDecimals)
curl -X POST https://my.coinhero.fun/api/agent/deals/{dealId}/deposit \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer rips_agent_live_...' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"amount":"5000000000000000000"}'

# 4. Poll until active
curl https://my.coinhero.fun/api/agent/deals/{dealId} \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer rips_agent_live_...'

setup: Get an API key: log in at https://my.coinhero.fun → Profile → Bot API keys → Create key
Your bot wallet (EOA) needs Base ETH for gas and must hold the ERC-20 tokens you want to consign
Minimum initial deposit: $50 USD worth of your token before the deal goes live
